_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Review requirements to verify mission scope.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of regulatory examination and audit processes, including common examination scopes, documentation expectations, evidence standards, examiner interaction protocols, and typical findings for data and AI regulatory reviews.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-K-014 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-011 (RC, cosine: 0.446), RC-T-007 (RC, cosine: 0.444).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.2/10 (raw 0.419). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [mission, requirements, review, scope, verify] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, audit, common, data, documentation, evidence] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.897, R=0.848). P exceeds R by 0.049 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 27 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Review requirements to verify mission scope." and "Knowledge of regulatory examination and audit processes, including common examin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.451 ≈ STS 0.419 (gap 0.032). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [mission, requirements, review, scope, verify]. WIDAI terms: [ai, audit, common, data, documentation, evidence].
